model_note: Capabilities are the discrete execution primitives (tool entrypoints) exposed to the worker at runtime, plus higher-order capabilities inferred from skills. Tool entrypoints are classified 'observed' (directly exposed in the runtime tool interface). Skill-derived capabilities are classified 'inferred' from SKILL.md descriptions.

tool_entrypoints.description: Execute shell commands in a persistent session.
Load a specialized skill into context.
Launch a subagent for autonomous multi-step work. Runtime permission = ask.
Write / overwrite files on the local filesystem.

skill_capabilities.capability: Author Architecture Decision Records.
skill_capabilities.justification: Derived from adr SKILL.md description (ADR format and process).

skill_capabilities.capability: Reference knowledge of the Aegir counterpart agent.
Design and review REST APIs.
Reason about system topology and node distribution.
Select branch-first execution mode (PATCH/REFACTOR/LANDSLIDE).
Apply interaction style and Telegram notification rule.
Apply Git-workflow deployment mandate and Slarti/Lydia boundary.
Run 6-phase debugging methodology.
Operate Gitea via tea-cli, API, admin, SSH patterns.
Produce read-only Gitea instance dashboard snapshot.
Operate github.com via gh CLI.
Interrogate proposals and emit ADR documentation.
Retrospect a session and crystallize reusable patterns.
Compress a session into a handoff document.
Assert agent identity and authority boundaries.
Apply known homelab gotchas during diagnosis.
Provide canon/narrative context.
Manage Docker services on the Pi5.
Eliminate requirement ambiguity via structured questions.
Build throwaway prototypes to validate design.
Drive development test-first (red-green-refactor).
Apply test-first and blackbox testing before merge.
Move issues/PRs through a triage state machine.
Run 7-phase execution model and delegation tree.
Debug Eldir microservices systematically.
Set up Eldir services and features.
Delegate backlog tasks to Vekling subagents.
Configure opencode itself (config, agents, skills, plugins).
skill_capabilities.justification: Derived from builtin customize-opencode skill description.

implicit_capabilities.capability: Orchestrate subagents through defined policy profiles (flash-free, local-fast, luna, sol, terra).
implicit_capabilities.justification: Inferred from presence of ~/.config/opencode/agent/*.md subagent profiles combined with cap.tool.task.
implicit_capabilities.constraint_observed: Each subagent start requires explicit operator approval (AGENTS.md); permission.task=ask in opencode.jsonc.

implicit_capabilities.justification: Inferred from command block in opencode.jsonc.

implicit_capabilities.capability: Route inference to local Ollama models.
implicit_capabilities.justification: Inferred from provider.ollama block in opencode.jsonc; runtime availability not verified in this study (documentation_only).

implicit_capabilities.capability: Access project reference directories (memory, backlog, context, workspace, tools).
implicit_capabilities.justification: Inferred from references block in opencode.jsonc and runtime available_references.
